name: GH_PrincipalState
summary: Enumerates the different possible states in which the masterness of a parameter can occur.

enum_values.name: CannotBePrincipal
enum_values.summary: This parameter cannot be a principal parameter. It is not a valid component input.

enum_values.name: IsPrincipal
enum_values.summary: This parameter is the current principal parameter as defined by the component which owns it.

enum_values.name: IsNotPrincipal
enum_values.summary: This parameter is not the current principal parameter, but it could be.
